info.description: A comprehensive RESTful API backend for the Sizzle & Rhythm food delivery platform built with PHP, supporting vendor management, customer ordering, payment processing, and real-time operations.
info.title: Sizzle & Rhythm API

bearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT token in the format: Bearer {token}

post.description: Registers a new user with email and password. Phone is optional. Sends OTP for email verification.

message.example: Your registration was successful! Kindly verify your email to proceed.

post.description: Verify user's email address using OTP code sent via email

message.example: Your account has been verified successfully!

post.description: Resend verification OTP to user's email or phone
Authenticate user with email or phone and password. Returns JWT token.
Logout user (client should remove JWT token)
Get a new JWT token using current valid token

get.description: Returns Google authorization URL to redirect user for OAuth login. Copy the authUrl from response and paste in browser.

message.example: Redirect user to this URL to authorize with Google

get.description: Handles Google OAuth callback with authorization code. After authorizing with Google, you'll be redirected here automatically.

post.description: Authenticate user using Google ID token (for mobile apps and SPAs using Google Sign-In SDK)

idToken.description: Google ID token from Google Sign-In SDK

post.description: Send a password reset OTP to user's email or phone.
Verify the OTP sent to user's email or phone for password reset.

message.example: OTP verified. You may now reset your password.

post.description: Update user's password after successful OTP verification.

message.example: Password updated successfully. You may now log in.

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information.

post.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information (name, phone, etc).

get.description: Retrieve list of available and configured payment gateways

post.description: Initialize a payment transaction with the specified gateway

get.description: Verify a payment transaction using the transaction reference

post.description: Verify a payment transaction using the transaction reference (alternative POST method)

get.description: Retrieve payment transaction history for authenticated user

post.description: Handle webhook notifications from payment gateways

get.description: Handle user redirect after payment completion

parameters.name: redirect
parameters.description: Set to 'web' to redirect to frontend URL

post.description: Configure payment gateway credentials and settings (Admin only)

user_id.description: User ID for user-specific config (null for system-wide)

post.description: Test payment gateway connection with provided credentials (Admin only)

get.description: Retrieve payment transaction analytics and statistics (Admin only)

tags.name: Payment
tags.description: Payment processing and transaction management endpoints

tags.name: Payment Admin
tags.description: Payment gateway administration and analytics endpoints
